abilities.description: Shuffle your library, then exile the top card. Until end of turn, you may play that card without paying its mana cost.

effect.description: Shuffle your library, then exile the top card. Until end of turn, you may play that card without paying its mana cost.
effect.name: Shuffle

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control."
